subcodes.first_line: O Lord! In this mighty Dispensation Thou didst manifest Thyself through the evident Sovereign, and in the Great Resurrection through the luminous Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار در این کور عظیم بسلطان مبین تجلی فرمودی و در حشر اکبر بجمال انور
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @unity of governments; political unity
